summary: The implementation successfully addresses all requested requirements. The backend provides a complete data model and methods for managing t-shirt brands, while the frontend displays brands in a modern grid layout with a form for adding new entries. The visual design uses Tailwind CSS with a cohesive purple/pink color scheme appropriate for retail/fashion. All acceptance criteria appear to be met based on the code evidence.

hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest explicitly lists 'User authentication or personalized features' as a non-goal, but the implementation includes full Internet Identity authentication setup with useInternetIdentity hook, AuthClient integration, and identity-based actor management.

hallucinated_features.description: Placeholder brand logo images displayed on brand cards
hallucinated_features.reason: While the BuildRequest specifies an image requirement for 'placeholder-brand.dim_200x200.png', there is no requirement to actually display brand logos or placeholder images on the brand cards. REQ-4 only requires displaying brand name, clickable link, and price range.
The backend includes sorting logic in the getAllBrands method that sorts brands alphabetically. No requirement requested sorting or ordering of brands.
